title: huperzia selago var. serrata
intro: Huperzia selago var. serrata, also known as firmoss, is a type of club moss that belongs to the Huperziaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of firmoss include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Firmoss is typically prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used as an alternative treatment for conditions such as Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, and age-related cognitive decline.
